name: Storz & Bickel Magazine with 8 Dosing Capsules
summary: The Storz & Bickel Magazine comes with 8 Dosing Capsules, each containing over 0.1 grams of dry herbal blends.
description: The Storz & Bickel Magazine comes with 8 Dosing Capsules, each containing over 0.1 grams of dry herbal blends. These capsules fit perfectly in the Mighty and Crafty vaporisers, as well as the Plenty and Volcano (Easy Valve set only) with the chamber reducer ring. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
